field_values.action_summary: After hours of isolation, the protagonist uses intense mental willpower to break the paralysis. Upon standing, he realizes he has undergone a metamorphosis: his new, naked self stands upright while his original, clothed body remains lying lifeless on the cave floor.
field_values.emotional_beat: From intense mental struggle to profound shock and existential horror.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of physical struggle/effort; Wide/Medium reveal shot showing standing naked figure and lying clothed body in one frame; Close-ups of face during realization
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Exact spatial distance between the old body and new self
Lighting consistency across both versions of the character
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute the supernatural metamorphosis reveal by staging a dual-presence shot containing both the transformed naked protagonist and his original clothed corpse.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (The "New" Self): Naked, agile, post-transformation state.
- protagonist (The "Old" Body): Clothed, lifeless, prone.

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave: Deep shadows, rocky floor.

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact spatial distance between the old body and new self.
- Lighting consistency across both versions of the character.

## Beat List
- BT001: Mental struggle to break paralysis.
- BT002: The metamorphosis and standing.
- BT003: Realization and existential horror.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
